title: Mobs Consent
description: Creepers and all other mobs are now legally required to ask for permission before attacking you. Just say 'Nah' to banish them to the void.
body:
**Mob Consent**

**Personal space matters.**

_Inspired by CreeperConsent_

**How It Works**

This is a **Fabric** mod for version **1.20.2**.

When you deny a mob's request, the mod runs a command to teleport the mob into the void 
(y = -200). To keep your immersion intact, 
The mod also intercepts and hides the "Teleported..." chat message so you don't get spammed.

**Requirements**

Minecraft 1.20.2

Fabric Loader

Fabric API

Cheats Enabled (Since the mod uses a teleport command to remove mobs).

**FAQ**

**Q: Is this client-side or server-side?**

A: It is a client-side mod that executes server-side commands. You can install it on your client, but you need OP/Cheat permissions on the server (or singleplayer world) for the "No" button to actually work.

**Q: Will this work on bosses?**

A: If the boss is considered a hostile mob and gets close enough to you yes.

**Q: Why did I make this?**

A: Boredom.
